contract_meta.rationale: Phase 2C adds observability for clarification usage and smart defaults to reduce friction. Backend-only work, safe territory.
references: Phase 2B Audit showing meta file gaps

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Add clarification telemetry to meta files and implement smart defaults for question suggestions. Complete Phase 2 (Interactive Clarification).
project.work_profile: Backend logic and data structures - no UI modifications

execution_model.description: Agent verifies Phase 2B completion, then adds telemetry and smart defaults. Backend-only work.

observability.description: Enhances clarification observability with full question/answer telemetry

tasks.title: Verify Phase 2B completion
tasks.description: Confirm Phase 2B UI integration is complete before starting Phase 2C enhancements

evaluation.intent: Verify Phase 2B complete before Phase 2C enhancements
evaluation.success_criteria: All Phase 2B artifacts exist and tests pass
evaluation.on_fail: HALT - Phase 2B must be complete before Phase 2C

tasks.title: Win #18: Add Clarification to Telemetry
tasks.description: Augment _executor_meta.json to include full clarification telemetry: questions asked, answers given, and success improvement indicator
tasks.work_profile: Backend data structure and metadata enrichment

ensure: Add optional clarification field to schema
Structure: {asked: boolean, questions: array, answers: array, improvedSuccess: boolean}
When /api/clarify was called, store questions in execution context
When clarifications provided, include full telemetry in meta file
Calculate improvedSuccess: true if clarifications used AND final status is 'pass'
Include both questions and answers in meta.clarification object

test_cases: meta file includes clarification data when used
clarification.asked is true when questions were shown
meta file correct when clarifications skipped
meta file correct when no clarifications needed

success_criteria: Meta file includes complete clarification telemetry when used

demo_requirement.manual_test: Generate project with clarifications, verify _executor_meta.json includes questions, answers, and improvedSuccess flag
demo_requirement.approval_needed: Developer confirms telemetry captures useful data for future analytics

tasks.title: Win #19: Smart Default Suggestions
tasks.description: Create suggestDefaults function that analyzes prompts for context clues and suggests intelligent defaults for questions

content_spec.function_signature: export function suggestDefaults(prompt: string, missingTypes: string[]): Record<string, any>
heuristics: Scan for language hints: 'Python' → Flask/FastAPI, 'Node'/'JavaScript' → Express
Scan for framework mentions: if 'Flask' found, default to Flask
Scan for port mentions: extract number if present
Return object mapping info type to suggested default value
edge_cases: Multiple language mentions: prefer first explicit mention
No clear hints: return empty object (no defaults)

ensure: Call suggestDefaults(prompt, missingTypes) to get default suggestions
Add 'default' or 'suggested' field to question objects when default available
Maintain existing question structure, just augment with defaults

test_cases: No language hints returns empty defaults

ensure: Verify questions include suggested defaults when applicable

validation.rationale: Verify all tests still pass with defaults integrated

success_criteria: No UI required (defaults exposed via API, UI can render them)

demo_requirement.manual_test: Test prompts: 'build Python API', 'build Node API', 'simple app', 'production app' - verify defaults suggested
demo_requirement.approval_needed: Developer confirms defaults are reasonable and reduce friction

tasks.title: Phase 2 Complete - Final Validation Gate
tasks.description: Final validation that entire Phase 2 (Interactive Clarification) is complete and production-ready

test_scenarios: Incomplete prompt → questions with smart defaults → answer → generation uses augmented prompt
Complete prompt → no questions → generation works normally
Skip questions → generation uses original prompt
Meta file includes clarification telemetry with questions and answers

evaluation.intent: Confirm entire Phase 2 (Interactive Clarification) is production-ready
evaluation.success_criteria: All Phase 2 components exist, all tests pass, end-to-end flows work, telemetry captures data, smart defaults reduce friction
evaluation.on_pass: PHASE 2 COMPLETE - System asks clarifying questions, augments prompts, reduces failed builds. Ready for Phase 3 decision.
evaluation.on_fail: HALT - Fix issues before declaring Phase 2 complete

phase_2_completion_metrics.detection_accuracy: System correctly identifies missing info in >90% of test prompts
phase_2_completion_metrics.augmentation_effectiveness: Augmented prompts produce better results than original (manual A/B testing)
phase_2_completion_metrics.ui_usability: Wife can use clarification flow without instructions
phase_2_completion_metrics.telemetry_completeness: All clarification interactions captured in meta files
phase_2_completion_metrics.smart_defaults_usefulness: Defaults reduce user effort for common cases

win_isolation.description: Each win must be complete and tested before proceeding to next
win_isolation.implementation: Run tests after each win. Manual demo required for W18 and W19.

P2-GATE.on_fail: HALT execution. Fix issues before declaring Phase 2 complete.
P2-GATE.report: Generate comprehensive Phase 2 completion report with metrics.

backend_only.enforcement: Phase 2C makes ZERO UI changes. All work is backend data structures and logic.
backend_only.rationale: UI is complete from Phase 2B. Phase 2C enriches backend capabilities only.

fallback_policies.phase2b_verification_fails: HALT - Phase 2B must be complete before 2C.
fallback_policies.test_fails: Fix implementation, do not skip tests.
fallback_policies.coverage_drops: Add tests to maintain >80% coverage before proceeding.
fallback_policies.telemetry_breaks_existing_meta: Ensure backward compatibility - meta files without clarifications still valid.

release_actions.cmd: git commit -m "feat(phase2c): add clarification telemetry and smart defaults - Phase 2 complete"

post_release_celebration.rationale: Phase 2 is a major milestone. System now asks clarifying questions and augments prompts intelligently. This dramatically reduces failed builds.

ai_executor_guidelines.observability_first: Trace all decisions. Log reasoning for each win completion.
ai_executor_guidelines.win_isolation: Complete and test each win fully before proceeding to next.
ai_executor_guidelines.backend_only: Phase 2C is backend-only. No UI modifications.
ai_executor_guidelines.test_driven: Write tests for telemetry and defaults. Verify integration.
ai_executor_guidelines.fail_fast: If any test fails, halt and fix before proceeding.
ai_executor_guidelines.gate_enforcement: P2-GATE is Phase 2 completion - significant milestone requiring comprehensive validation.
ai_executor_guidelines.telemetry_focus: Win #18 is critical for future analytics. Capture complete clarification data.

governance_note.for_human: Phase 2C is backend work (safe territory). Two wins, straightforward data structure and logic work. After P2-GATE passes, Phase 2 is COMPLETE. Take full day off. Celebrate with wife. Discuss Phase 3 decision when refreshed, not immediately after completion.
